# Code of Conduct

PuruPuru PNGTuber aims to be a welcoming project for creators and developers.

## Expected behavior

- Be respectful and constructive.
- Assume good intent.
- Keep feedback focused on the project and the work.
- Respect asset rights, creator identities, and privacy.

## Unacceptable behavior

- Harassment, threats, discrimination, or personal attacks.
- Sharing private assets, personal information, or confidential material.
- Encouraging copyright infringement or misuse of bundled assets.
- Spam or repeated off-topic posting.

## Enforcement

Maintainers may edit, hide, or remove comments and may restrict participation when needed to keep the project safe and constructive.
